steps.t: You should check on and collect melted snow from Dági's collection buckets. He placed the buckets at a snowy overlook to the south-east of Ashmargathâ…
The collection buckets have been tampered with. Checking the surrounding snow for clues may point you to the right direction.
Dági at Ashmargathâl will want to know about the Orc footprints you found.
